channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: UN leadership candidate calls for bolder action and reform amid global crises
item.description: Rebeca Grynspan, a Costa Rican economist and leading candidate for the role of UN Secretary-General, has urged the United Nations to take more calculated risks and to embrace stronger moral leadership...

item.title: WHO says Ebola outbreak in DR Congo can be stopped but remains complex amid conflict
item.description: The Director-General of the World Health Organization (WHO), Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, has stated that the ongoing Ebola outbreak in the Democratic Republic of Congo is “very complex” but still “can...

item.title: Limpopo Premier criticises clinic staff over delayed patient care due to morning tea breaks
item.description: Limpopo Premier Phophi Ramathuba has strongly criticised staff at Mahwelereng Clinic in the Waterberg District after allegations that patients are only being attended to from around 9am, despite nurse...

item.title: Johnnie Walker Blue Society launches first Nigerian event with Juliet Olanipekun
item.description: Na so Johnnie Walker Blue Label don bring their Blue Society to Nigeria with one kind exclusive dinner wey Juliet Olanipekun dey host. The event happen for Lagos on May 24 and e gather plenty creative...

item.title: Sen. John Cornyn Faces Backlash After Posting Fable Following Primary Loss Backed by Trump
item.description: U.S. Senator John Cornyn (R-TX) drew widespread criticism and online ridicule after sharing a classic fable on social media following his apparent political setback in a Republican primary runoff. Cor...

item.title: PTI alleges arrest and expulsion of its leaders in Gilgit-Baltistan during election campaign
item.description: Pakistan Tehreek-e-Insaf (PTI) has raised serious allegations regarding the arrest and expulsion of its leaders, including MNA Junaid Akbar, from Gilgit-Baltistan during their election campaign ahead ...

item.title: MCK issues guidelines for journalists planning to contest 2027 elections
item.description: The Media Council of Kenya (MCK) has encouraged journalists and other media practitioners who are interested in politics to consider vying for elective positions in the upcoming 2027 General Election....

item.title: Mpumalanga government warns against illegal initiation schools ahead of winter season
item.description: The article discusses the ongoing debate and concerns surrounding traditional initiation schools in South Africa, particularly as the winter initiation season begins. These practices, which serve as a...

item.title: Man admits aiding suicides after selling toxic chemicals online to victims worldwide
item.description: A 60-year-old man, Kenneth Law, has pleaded guilty in Canada to 14 counts of aiding suicides after selling toxic chemicals online to people across the world. The guilty pleas were entered in an Ontari...

item.title: New Zealand Riders Launch Bikepacking Journey from London to Vietnam with Guinness World Record Tea Delivery
item.description: Three New Zealanders, Louie Tatom Cross, Alfie Duffy, and Josh Stackhouse, have embarked on an ambitious bikepacking adventure called the Slow Miles Club. The group is cycling from London to Vietnam a...

item.title: Temporary UFC Arena Constructed on South Lawn for President Trump's 80th Birthday Celebration
item.description: As the United States approaches its 250th anniversary, President Donald Trump is focusing on celebrating his 80th birthday on June 14, 2026, with a unique event at the White House. A temporary UFC are...

item.title: Tentative U.S.–Iran agreement signals possible end to conflict and reopening of Strait of Hormuz
item.description: Senior U.S. and Iranian officials reported Thursday that both countries have reached a tentative agreement aimed at ending months of armed conflict in the Middle East and restoring maritime access thr...

item.title: Proposed $250 Bill Featuring Trump Faces Political Pushback from GOP Lawmakers
item.description: Former Senator Claire McCaskill expressed concern over a proposal to place President Donald Trump's image on a new $250 bill, warning that Republican members of Congress would face significant politic...

item.title: Tanzania reassures investors on national stability and economic resilience after 2025 unrest
item.description: Tanzania’s ruling party leadership has moved to reassure both local and international investors that the country remains stable, united, and open for investment despite brief civil unrest that occurre...

item.title: Kwara Pastor Recounts Deadly Terrorist Attack on Church in Woro Community
item.description: Pastor Adesoji Dada Aderemi of Divine Evangelical Mission Church for Woro, Kwara State, don tell how life scatter for him and him church members during one February 3, 2026 attack. According to the pa...

item.title: First villager rescued after week-long cave flood rescue operation in Laos
item.description: Rescue divers in Laos have successfully evacuated the first of five villagers trapped inside a flooded cave system for more than a week. The incident occurred after the group entered the cave in searc...

item.title: Trump responds to Jill Biden comments about Joe Biden’s debate performance and health concerns
item.description: Former U.S. President Donald Trump responded on Truth Social to recent comments made by former First Lady Jill Biden regarding President Joe Biden’s performance during a 2024 presidential debate. In a...

item.title: Davao Region advances to Palarong Pambansa basketball finals after semifinal win over NCR
item.description: Davao Region’s secondary boys basketball team secured a spot in the Palarong Pambansa finals by defeating the National Capital Region (NCR) in the semifinals on May 29, 2026, at the Datu Lipus Makaond...

item.title: Australian Government Announces Major Overhaul of Workforce Australia and JobSeeker Services
item.description: The Australian Government has unveiled a $312 million reform of its employment services system, affecting over a million Australians on programs like JobSeeker. Minister for Employment and Workplace R...

item.title: Popular Gel Hairstyles for Black Women for Every Occasion
item.description: Gel hairstyles are becoming increasingly popular among black women in Kenya and beyond because they are versatile, stylish, and easy to maintain. Whether your hair is natural, relaxed, short, or long,...
